items.title: [正面] Went in for the Saya no Uta collab event, but what...
items.summary: Went in for the Saya no Uta collab event, but what I found was a hidden gem in the gacha space with great roguelike deck building gameplay and lovecraftian horror aesthetics! Also despite being a gacha, the devs are so generous giving almost 350+ free pulls just for this anniversary event alone. Give it a try!

Also despite being a gacha, the devs are so generous giving almost 350+ free pulls just for this anniversary event alone. Give it a try!

items.title: [正面] good roguelike game. good combos, good compos, goo...
items.summary:
good roguelike game. good combos, good compos, good design. i like the fact its also a gatcha.

i dont care about the story tho, id like to completely skip it. and the translation is a bit bad.

items.title: [正面] Probabilmente il miglior gatcha che ho provato neg...
items.summary: Probabilmente il miglior gatcha che ho provato negli ultimi anni. La componente PTW è pressoché assente e si può progredire nel gioco senza alcun problema. La storia predne molti influssi da Lovecraft e autori simili, è intrigante ed è accompagnata da un gameplay deckbuilder semplice, intuitivo e sopratutto appagante. Le visual art dei personaggi, sfondi etc sono incredibili, esattamente come è incredibile la musica e le colonne sonore.

items.title: [正面] I was always very fascinated with gacha games. I m...
items.summary:
I was always very fascinated with gacha games. I mean How can such a huge genre not have a single good game? It truly fascinated me, so I kept searching. And then I found Morimens through some random youtube documentary.

The gameplay actually feels good and satisfying (unlike other gachas which have a very cheap feel, especially those 3d open world games). It is very reminiscent of Slay the Spire, so if you like that I can not encourage you enough to try this game.

The story is compelling and interesting with the MC actually being a character instead of a self insert like in other gachas. This makes it so he/she actually has a personality. I absolutely enjoyed reading through these visual novels! I am only 4 chapters in and I can't wait to see what awaits me in the future.

Also the gacha side seems very generous with it rewarding large amounts of Silver (pull currency). You also get HUGE amounts of standard pulls, like hundreds within a week or two of playing (especially if you enter the promo codes you can find online or in their discord)

items.title: [正面] I didn't even know this game existed... and then t...
items.summary:
I didn't even know this game existed... and then they added Saya and well uh yeah now I know it exists.
The art style is amazing, the characters so creative.
Plays like slay the spire (I never played it), a card game with blocks and attacks and all that stuff.

items.title: [正面] 目前感觉卡牌构筑很牛逼，鬼知道制作组爬了多少遍塔，如果没有数值膨胀可以爆杀99%卡牌二游了，此处特指...
items.summary: 目前感觉卡牌构筑很牛逼，鬼知道制作组爬了多少遍塔，如果没有数值膨胀可以爆杀99%卡牌二游了，此处特指1999. 除此之外，美术牛逼，剧情走向暂时看不出来，剧情文案拉的一坨大的，写得不知所云就算了，某些地方还一股ai生成的味道
